Run Genomic CDM ETL scripts

Source: R/simulateGenomicData.R
run_genomic_etl.Rd

Executes the G-CDM SQL scripts that transform simulated genomic data (created by simulateGenomicData) into the OHDSI Genomic CDM extension tables: GENOMIC_TEST, TARGET_GENE, VARIANT_OCCURRENCE, VARIANT_ANNOTATION. Also creates supporting SPECIMEN and PROCEDURE_OCCURRENCE records.

Usage

run_genomic_etl(con, config = NULL, verbose = TRUE)

Arguments

con

A DBI connection to the DuckDB database.

config

ETL configuration list (same as used for run_etl). If NULL, uses default_etl_config().

verbose

Logical. Print progress messages. Default TRUE.

Value

Invisible NULL.

Details

Must be called AFTER simulateGenomicData() has populated the stg.genomic_variants, stg.snp_reference, and stg.snp_trait_map staging tables.
